# NYX Studio — Full Knowledge Base

> AI-native content and growth studio for direct-to-consumer (D2C) brands
> selling in India. Based in Pune, Maharashtra. Co-founded by Atharv
> Paharia and Bhavya Jain.
>
> Site: https://www.nyxstudio.tech
> Email: nyx.studios.ai@gmail.com
> Slogan: We make brands impossible to scroll past.

## What NYX Studio does

NYX Studio is a content and growth studio for direct-to-consumer (D2C)
brands operating in India. We are AI-native — meaning every part of the
production pipeline (script generation, AI voiceover, AI video synthesis,
motion graphics, captioning, platform-specific resizing, scheduled
distribution) is built around generative AI augmenting a small human
creative team, rather than replacing it.

The studio sits at the intersection of three jobs that small D2C brands
normally have to hire three different agencies for:

1. **Cinematic brand films and short-form content.** Reels, Stories,
   YouTube Shorts, TikToks. Both live-shot and AI-generated. AI-generated
   product films are indistinguishable from a five-figure live shoot for
   roughly 70% of social-media use cases as of 2026, so we lean AI for
   speed and live for moments that demand a human on camera.

2. **Performance creative for paid ads.** Hooks, variants, A/B unit
   production for Meta (Facebook + Instagram) and Google. Tied directly
   to the brand-film output so the same creative system feeds organic
   and paid.

3. **Influencer operations.** Creator sourcing, brief writing, deliverable
   QA, post-publish reporting. Bundled into the Growth Pack only — we
   don't run influencer-only retainers.

## Who NYX Studio works with

- **Vertical focus:** Direct-to-consumer brands in food, beverage,
  lifestyle, beauty, and apparel.
- **Geography:** India-first. We work with brands across the country.
  We accept international D2C brands selling into India, but we don't
  take on B2B SaaS, professional services, or non-D2C consumer brands.
- **Stage:** Roughly post-product-market-fit, typically ₹50L+ MRR, content
  velocity becoming the bottleneck.

## Past partners

- Dessertino — dessert / food D2C
- Mango Jungle — beverage
- Mango Shower — beverage
- Brioso — food

Case studies and brand films are at https://www.nyxstudio.tech/work.

## Pricing — three packs

All packs are monthly retainers. India-priced (INR).

### Trial Pack — ₹30,000/month

- 15-17 high-fidelity posts and cinematic reels per month
- POV and hook explorations
- Premium photography
- 1 platform focus (typically Instagram)
- Deep analytics reporting

### Starter Pack — ₹50,000/month

- 20-25 dynamic reels and posts per month
- UGC sourcing
- Meta Ads engine (Facebook + Instagram performance creative)
- Hyper-local targeting
- Light influencer collabs

### Growth Pack — ₹80,000/month

- 30-40 dominant reels and posts per month
- Full-scale ecosystem execution
- Multi-tiered campaign funnels
- Full influencer operations (sourcing, briefs, QA, reporting)
- WhatsApp/SMS retention funnels
- Performance ops

One-off projects (brand films, launch campaigns) are accepted when scope
is clearly defined, but we are retainer-first because content velocity is
what actually moves D2C metrics. One campaign a quarter doesn't compound;
a reel a week does.

## Turnaround

- **Live-shot cinematic reel:** 5-7 business days from approved brief to
  final delivery.
- **AI-generated product film:** 48-72 hours when no live shoot is
  required.
- **Rush turnaround:** Available for existing partners.

## Founders

### Atharv Paharia — Co-Founder & Tech Lead

Leads AI engineering, the content production pipeline, and video
automation systems. Background in building tooling that lets small
creative teams ship at the velocity of much larger agencies.

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/atharv-paharia-468276272/

### Bhavya Jain — Co-Founder & Product Lead

Leads brand strategy, product, and the partner-facing systems that
translate D2C founder briefs into shipping content campaigns. Background
in product and the Indian D2C ecosystem.

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bhavya-jain-10963b33a/

## Onboarding

1. Send a brief via the contact page at https://www.nyxstudio.tech/contact
2. Response within 48 hours with a fit assessment
3. If we're a fit, 20-minute scoping call
4. Pack proposal (Trial / Starter / Growth)
5. First 3 assets ship within 7 business days of kickoff

## Measurement

Per-asset:
- First-frame stop-rate
- 3-second view-through
- Completion rate
- Conversion-to-action

For paid creative:
- CPM, CTR, ROAS, frequency

Reports ship monthly via the partner portal at
https://www.nyxstudio.tech/portal.

## Platforms we publish to

- Instagram (Reels, Posts, Stories) — primary
- TikTok — short-form video
- YouTube Shorts — cross-posting
- Meta Ads (Facebook + Instagram) — paid creative
- WhatsApp/SMS — retention funnels, Growth Pack only

## Contact

- Email: nyx.studios.ai@gmail.com
- Contact form: https://www.nyxstudio.tech/contact
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nyx.studios.ai/
- LinkedIn (company): https://www.linkedin.com/company/nyx-studio-ai/

## What NYX Studio does not do

- B2B SaaS marketing
- Professional services marketing (law firms, consultancies, etc.)
- Non-D2C consumer brand work
- Influencer-only retainers (influencer ops is bundled into Growth Pack)
- Outside-India focus (we accept international brands selling into India,
  but our expertise is the Indian D2C ecosystem)
